# arenaml Provider



## Example Usage

```terraform
# Copyright (c) ArenaML Labs Pvt Ltd.

terraform {
  required_providers {
    arenaml = {
      source  = "arenaml/arenaml"
      version = "0.0.4"
    }
  }
}

provider "arenaml" {
  # Configuration options
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_url` (String) Server URL
